channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-123] Port yaml and auster to b1_8
item.description: We need the changes to test-framework to support yaml in b1_8 so we can use our test framework with b1_8. We also need the fixes made to acceptance-small.sh on master to move all the test specific code to the test scripts. This will allow us to use auster to run the tests.
item.summary: Port yaml and auster to b1_8

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » i686,server,el5,inkernel #17
LU-123 Port yaml and auster to b1_8

Johann Lombardi : 30d9df1a69d325c416ed7027ddd34464f097396f

  • lustre/tests/large-scale.sh
  • lustre/tests/obdfilter-survey.sh

The patch for lustre-release/b1_8 with correct comment format is at http://review.whamcloud.com/421
Bobijam will be looking into this one
Chris took a stab at this a while ago in http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,148 but this needs some work to merge with b1_8.
